· Handmade Macramé & Decor ·

Hello, I'm Meghna

I'm a 12th grader from Bhopal, India, and the heart behind KnotM. What started as a hobby I learnt from my mummy has grown into something I truly love — a small handmade business built one knot at a time.

I started learning macramé 8 years ago, sitting beside my mummy and watching her hands work magic with cord and patience. Two years ago, I decided to turn that passion into KnotM — a place where every piece is made with care, intention, and a whole lot of love.

8+
Years of Crafting
17+
Unique Products
100%
Handmade with Love

Our Story

KnotM was born in a small corner of our home in Bhopal, where threads of cord slowly became art. Every keychain, every wall hanging, every chandelier — each one is made by hand, with no machines, no shortcuts, and no compromises.

I work on every order during my free time alongside my studies. Each piece takes hours of focused work, and that's exactly what makes it special. When you buy from KnotM, you're not just buying a product — you're taking home a piece of someone's time, skill, and heart.

My mummy has been my greatest teacher and inspiration. This business is as much hers as it is mine, and I hope to keep growing it — one knot at a time.

"She taught me that the most beautiful things in life are made slowly, with patience and love."

— Meghna Batham, Founder, KnotM

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before placing your order

How long does shipping take?

+
Once your order is placed, we will arrange shipping via Shiprocket. Delivery time depends on your location — typically 3–7 business days across India. For made-to-order items, please allow the production time mentioned on the product page before shipping begins. We will keep you updated via email.

Can I request a custom colour or design?

+
Absolutely! Custom colour and design requests are warmly welcome. Simply mention your preferences in the "Order Notes" field at checkout, or reach out to us via the Contact page before ordering. We love making personalised pieces and will do our best to bring your vision to life.

Do you accept bulk orders for weddings or gifting?

+
Yes! We absolutely take bulk orders for weddings, corporate gifting, festive occasions, baby showers and more. Keychains and small items make beautiful return gifts. Please contact us in advance so we can plan the timeline and give you the best possible service. Early bookings are recommended for large quantities.

What is your return and exchange policy?

+
Since all our products are handmade to order, we currently do not accept returns or exchanges. However, if your product arrives damaged or defective, we will absolutely make it right for you. Please share a photo of the issue within 48 hours of receiving your order and we will find the best solution together.

What does "Made to Order" mean?

+
Made to order means we create your piece fresh after you place your order — it is not a pre-made item sitting in stock. This ensures you receive the freshest, most carefully crafted product. The estimated production time is mentioned on each product page. We will confirm your order via email before we begin.

How do I place an order?

+
Simply browse the shop, pick your favourite product and colour, add it to your bag, and proceed to checkout. Fill in your delivery details and place the order. You will receive a confirmation email shortly after. If you have any questions, feel free to reach us via the Contact page — we are always happy to help!

Are all products really handmade?

+
100% yes! Every single product at KnotM is handcrafted by Meghna herself, using quality cord, beads and findings. No machines, no mass production. Each piece takes hours of careful work, which is what makes it truly special and unique. No two pieces are exactly alike.
